chinese_news.title: WAVES 2026：今年盛夏，在创投浪潮里，做迎风而立的少数人！
chinese_news.summary: 盛夏赴约WAVES 2026！一群迎风的少数人，掀起中国新一代创新力量的风口。

chinese_news.title: 瓷瓷乐玩 ：当传统文化遇上新消费浪潮 | 36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以“今年盛夏”为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些“少数人” 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

曹光洋 | 瓷瓷乐玩创始人

以下为对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 刚注册就成独角兽，具身创企昆仑行90天融资数十亿元｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
离开阿里云一年多以后，前阿里集团副总裁、阿里云中国区总裁任庚，以昆仑行创始人的身份，再次切入AI的战场。这次他锚定的领域，是AI的落地终端——机器人。

36氪获悉，昆仑行机器人注册不到90天，已接连完成了3轮融资，累计融资规模为数十亿元。3轮融资后，公司估值已超十亿美元，成为具身行业独角兽。这样的节奏显然刷新了具身智能行业的独角兽速度。

公司此前发布的信息显示，昆仑行机器人“对标特斯拉人形机器人这一行业标杆”，“坚持‘本体+大脑’双轮驱动战��”。前理想辅助驾驶一号位郎咸朋，是昆仑行的联合创始人。

一家接触过昆仑行的头部资本判断，任庚的重心，会更多地落在战略方向，组织体系搭建，商业运作、企业整体运营等，郎咸朋则主要负责AI技术的研发与落地。

这样的创业组合，让昆仑行饱受资本追捧。其首轮融资在企业注册不到3天时，便被顶级投资机构哄抢份额。有行业人士评价：“在这具身赛道内是较为罕见的。”

目前，昆仑行的股东有高瓴资本、高榕创投、钟鼎资本、中科创星、华业资本、创新

chinese_news.title: 从用户决策到Agent参与，值得买科技分享AI时代品牌经营新课题
chinese_news.summary:
6月16日-17日，36氪WAVES 2026新浪潮大会在广州举行。17日，值得买科技营销FDE（Forward Deployed Engineer，即前沿部署工程师）朱越受邀出席并发表主题演讲，结合公司在AI消费服务与品牌营销场景中的一线实践，分享了Agent时代消费决策链路的变化，以及品牌在此环境下如何更精准地被AI看见、理解和选择。

作为36氪旗下年度重要科技创新活动，WAVES新浪潮大会汇聚创业者、投资机构及产业代表，围绕AI、机器人、新消费、出海等前沿议题展开交流。作为值得买科技营销FDE，朱越长期参与AI产品在品牌营销

chinese_news.title: 硬氪首发 | 快手系AI芯片公司再融资数亿，销量近十万颗，视频压缩性能超英伟达
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 林晴晴

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，人工智能芯片公司「凌川科技」近日完成数亿元A+轮融资，本轮由啟赋资本领投，产业投资方新国都、知名投资机构金浦投资、朝晖资本、BV百度风投、水木投资集团、亦庄科创二期基金（北京科创亦庄直投基金），以及全球知名家办等参与投资，老股东顺禧基金、九智资本持续追加投资。项目落地北京亦庄，获亦庄国投重点支持，本轮融资将主要用于下一代芯片研发、现有产品SL200的量产扩产及海外市场拓展。

「凌川科技」成立于2024年3月，由北京市人工智能基金与快手集团共同发起设立，前身为快手集团的异构计算与芯片事业部，是一家以硬件为基础的软件公司，专注于智能视频与生成式视频等多模态大模型的底层算力。公司创始人、董事长兼CEO刘凌志为上海交大博士、华盛顿大学博士后，曾任快手集团副总裁及华为、英特尔等核心技术管理岗，于2018年起从零到一搭建了快手异构计算和芯片团队。团队在快手内部自研的SL200芯片智能视频SOC芯片，持续在快手部署数万颗、稳定服务7亿用户，公司于2024年

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 龚虹嘉、陆奇、海外资本下注，北大团队用肌电腕带做新一代数采终端
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，雪梦未来（SnowOrigin）团队获得龚虹嘉、陆奇及海外机构投资。这支北大背景团队以sEMG（表面肌电）运动神经信号解码技术为切入点，通过神经腕带、第一视角采集设备以及自研NMH（Neural Math Hybrid）AI解码模型，构建新一代面向具身智能的人类操控数据采集方案。

目前，随着具身智能和Physical AI快速发展，行业对于高质量人类操控数据的需求日益增长。然而主流的数据采集方式，无论是第一视角视频、动作捕捉还是遥操作系统，大多只能记录动作结果或空间轨迹，对于发力过程、操控意图以及细微调整等关键信息覆盖不足。

雪梦未来的神经腕带手环和全景头环等可穿戴设备，可结合肌电与运动神经信号解码技术，捕捉人类与真实世界交互过程，并将其转化为包含姿态（Pose）、力（Force）、微控制（Micro-control）的结构化数据，为机器人、世界模型及具身智能训练提供底层数据支撑（Data infr

chinese_news.title: 秋声 | 四川生物科技公司上市首日大跌31%，中信证券保荐
chinese_news.summary:
本文约3000字，建议阅读6分钟

作者 | 彭孝秋

编者按：AI 大爆发之际，越来越多公司走向资本市场。每一份招股书翻动的声音里，都藏着一家公司想说与未曾明说的全部。

鉴于此，硬氪特推出「秋声」专栏。秋声取自欧阳修《秋声赋》，借“听秋声”之意，观产业冷暖，辨公司成色，记录企业冲刺 IPO 途中那些被写下与被隐藏的真实。这是我们第一期，华健未来。

今日9点30分，四川生物科技公司华健未来（06132.HK）正式在港交所敲钟上市，但开盘即大跌。截至发稿时，华健未来已大跌31%，报56港元，市值41亿港元。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $70,000 by end of Q2 2026 (June 30)?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Bitcoin funding rates hit 2-week highs signaling bullish sentiment, but macro headwinds (tech selloff, SpaceX crash erasing half of BTC's market cap in 3 days) create genuine uncertainty near $63k support.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin funding rate hits 2-week high' + 'Bitcoin falls under $63,000 as tech selloff drags risk assets lower'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX stock recover to post-IPO opening price by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Post-IPO rally (June 12, 2026) has reversed sharply with 16% drop over three days; market testing whether this is washout or signal of deeper issues.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed implement a CBDC pilot program before January 1, 2027?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: U.S. Senate passed housing bill with four-year CBDC ban (until 2030), but Trump administration has signed quantum/cryptography orders; conflicting signals on digital currency intent.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk & Cointelegraph: 'US Senate passes housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030' + Trump quantum executive order

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Alphabet stock outperform Nasdaq-100 by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Alphabet had worst day in over a year on AI researcher exits; market pricing rotation away from big tech; question tests whether AI talent drain is priced in or presages deeper underperformance.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Alphabet has its worst day in over a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Apollo Global Management's main retail credit fund redemption requests exceed 25% by August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Apollo capped withdrawals at 17% redemption threshold; market now testing systemic stress in private credit; escalation to 25% would signal liquidity crisis.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Apollo curbs withdrawals after exit requests hit 17%, reigniting fears over private credit liquidity'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will global M&A deal value exceed $4 trillion in 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: PwC Global M&A report (annual publication, typically Q1 2027)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: PwC explicitly forecasts $4T for 2026 as 'strongest year since 2021,' yet no major prediction market has crystallized this binary; institutional desk would hedge quarterly performance.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Global M&A deal value on track to reach $4 trillion this year: PwC' + strong macro backdrop despite tech volatility

market_questions_to_create.question: Will a Lenovo or comparable Chinese robotics OEM announce a humanoid robot with >100,000 units ordered by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Company press release + third-party supply chain tracking (e.g., Gartner, IDC robotics reports)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr exclusive: Kunlun Row (ex-Alibaba Cloud VP Ren Geng) raised billions in 90 days, hitting $1B+ valuation as embodied AI unicorn; Chinese capital is flooding embodied robotics with urgency absent from English-language markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr reports Kunlun Row 'registered <90 days, completed 3 funding rounds, $10B+ valuation' — embodied AI race heating in China ahead of English media awareness

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Lingchuan Technology (凌川科技) achieve >500,000 AI chip units shipped by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Company investor presentation, supply chain reports, or press release; Lingchuan disclosed ~100k unit sales in A+ round announcement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: FLAG: 36Kr reports Lingchuan just raised A+ round with multi-billion RMB backing (Qifu Capital led), claims video compression performance 'exceeds NVIDIA'; Kuaishou-affiliated chipmaker flying under English-language radar.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr exclusive: 'Lingchuan completed A+ round with billion-yuan backing, 100k units sold, video compression beats Nvidia' — Chinese AI chip momentum underpriced in Western markets

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Pennsylvania's $20B economic development deal (data centers + manufacturing) face >$500M in unfunded state liabilities by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Pennsylvania Legislative Budget & Finance Committee reports; investigative journalism follow-ups (similar to CNBC's skepticism piece)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC narrative: Gov. Shapiro's record $20B deal 'caused no shortage of grief' with data-center-wary voters; subsidy cliff risk is real but unpriced in regional muni market.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Companies demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently' + 'PA $20B deal, largest ever, caused Shapiro grief'

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. Senate pass a crypto staking/mining tax bill (allowing rewards taxed-at-sale, not-at-receipt) by October 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Congress.gov bill passage record; official U.S. Senate vote log
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Crypto lobby groups (Cointelegraph reports) actively pushing Senate to pass staking/mining tax bill 'as is' without amendments; narrow window before election-year gridlock; retail crypto holder upside massively underpriced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'Crypto lobby urges Congress to pass staking and mining tax bill as is' — tri-group coalition lobbying hard, window closing

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin has bottomed near $63k support; Q2 pullback is capitulation into quantum/CBDC fear and macro spillover from tech; BTC/USD rallies to $72k+ by August 2026.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin price has limited downside, likely near bottom, contrarian indicator suggests'
CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin funding rate hits 2-week high' — institutional accumulation signal
Cointelegraph: 'Trump signs orders for quantum computer, cryptography upgrades' — pro-crypto crypto framework emerging despite CBDC ban rhetoric
investment_theses.counter_view: Macro spillover accelerates (recession fears, rate cut delays); tech rout contagion spreads; Bitcoin breaks $60k support if Fed remains hawkish or geopolitical shock (Iran, Ukraine) escalates.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot or BTC/USDC perps (Bybit, Deribit); hedge with short MSTR or SPY call spreads if macro concerns outweigh

investment_theses.thesis: Semiconductor sector (MU, NVDA, SMCI, Taiwan Semi) is oversold on AI demand doubts; 36Kr/Chinese sources reveal embodied robotics capex cycle is ramping hard (Kunlun Row, Lingchuan, sEMG startups raising billions), creating 18-month demand tail.
supporting_signals: FLAG: 36Kr exclusive — Kunlun Row (ex-Alibaba Cloud VP) $10B+ valuation in 90 days, billions in funding for humanoid robotics
FLAG: 36Kr — Lingchuan Technology A+ round with Qifu Capital, 100k units sold, claiming Nvidia-beating compression; multi-billion RMB backing
FLAG: 36Kr — SnowOrigin (sEMG neural wristbands) backed by dragon investors (Gong Hongjia, Lu Qi, overseas VCs); tier-1 embodied AI data infrastructure play
Hacker News: 'Steam Machine launches today' — consumer robotics narrative resurging
investment_theses.counter_view: Chinese embodied AI capex is state-driven bubble; Nvidia's next-gen H-series chips obsolete overinvestment; Taiwan Semi geopolitical risk (China cross-strait tensions) spikes capex cancellations.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU (DRAM for robotics inference) or short-duration calls on SMH (semiconductor ETF); avoid NVDA directly (already priced); Taiwan Semi ADR (TSM) if geopolitical risk premiums compress

investment_theses.thesis: Private credit systemic risk is real but concentrated; Apollo's 17% redemption cap signals stress, but broader PE/credit asset-class reprices on Q2-Q3 GAAP earnings surprises; credit spreads widen 40-60 bps by August, benefiting DXY and UST duration.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Apollo curbs withdrawals after exit requests hit 17%, reigniting fears over private credit liquidity'
Global M&A on track for record $4T but redemption pressure suggests fundraising fatigue; high-yield OAS historically spiked after comparable gates
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed pivot to rate cuts (if inflation cools faster than expected) floods credit with liquidity; Apollo's gate is isolated (fund-level, not systemic); private credit claws back in yield-hungry world.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (USD safe-haven demand); long TLT or IEF (10-30Y Treasuries); short HY (high-yield ETF, e.g., HYG) or JNK; USDC/USDT yield curve flattens on supply normalization

investment_theses.thesis: Alphabet's AI talent exodus is priced, but Anthropic/OpenAI moat widens if top researchers leave for latter two; tech mega-cap concentration risk creates rotation into semiconductors and cyber (S&P 600 Semiconductors, CrowdStrike, Palo Alto); Mag-7 underperforms by Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Alphabet has its worst day in over a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits'
Cointelegraph: 'Bitmine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin back Ethereum R&D nonprofit Ethlabs' — institutional AI R&D consolidating outside mega-cap walls
36Kr: Multiple startups (Kunlun, Lingchuan, SnowOrigin) raising billions outside Google ecosystem; talent flowing to founders
investment_theses.counter_view: Google's compute moats (TPUs, data) are irreplaceable; AI researcher exits are noise; Alphabet stock regains footing on Gemini 2.0 release and enterprise deals.
investment_theses.expression: Short GOOGL (or QQQ put spreads); long SMH (semiconductors), CRWD, PANW; neutral BTC if macro de-risks (Alphabet weakness != broader tech collapse)

investment_theses.thesis: Crypto regulatory tailwind (Trump quantum/cryptography orders, staking tax bill lobbying) + private credit squeeze = capital rotation into on-chain finance; BTC ETF inflows resume, ETH tokenization narratives re-ignite; ETH/BTC ratio rises to 0.085+ by September 2026.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'Trump signs orders for quantum computer, cryptography upgrades'; 'Crypto lobby urges Congress to pass staking and mining tax bill'
Cointelegraph: 'Bitmine, Sharplink, Joe Lubin back Ethlabs' — Ethereum staking/tokenization infrastructure consolidating
CoinDesk: 'U.S. Senate passes housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030' — removes central bank competition, pro-crypto regulatory environment
CoinDesk: 'Securitize and tZERO clash over patents as race to bring Wall Street onchain heats up'
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory anti-crypto backlash (Trump vs. ABC foreshadows broader hostility); CBDC ban perceived as threat to BTC; macro recession kills risk appetite; crypto stays correlated to equities.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH spot or ETH/USDC perps; long ETH/BTC ratio (buy ETH, short BTC weights); accumulate on dips near $2,800; hedge short GBTC if systemic credit crisis unfolds
